mapper.select:
SELECT * from (
SELECT ai.id id, ai.company_name companyName, ai.our_company_name ourCompanyName, ai.contract_no contractNo, con.contract_time contractTime, con.contract_type contractType, con.business_type businessType, con.buy_content_file_id buyContentFileId, con.sell_content_file_id sellContentFileId, con.file_id fileId, ai.product_name productName, ai.product_cd productCd, ai.brand_number brandNumber, ai.deal_number dealNumber, ai.deal_price dealPrice, ai.total_amount totalAmount, pa.created_date applyDate, ai.invoice_date invoiceDate, ai.deal_amount invoiceAmount, ai.remark remark, ai.invoice_no invoiceNo, pa.approve_no approveNo, pa.`status` approveStatus, pa.curr_approver_user_id currApproveUserId, dcsx.contract_no dcsxContractNo, if(dcsx.invoice_bill_amount >= dcsx.total_amount,'已开票','未开票') dcsxInvoiceStatus, ai.bank_name bankName, ai.bank_account bankAccount, ai.tax_no taxNo, ai.address address, ai.company_phone companyPhone, dcsx.file_id dcsxContractFileId FROM t_apply_invoice ai INNER JOIN t_pm_approve pa ON ai.approve_id = pa.id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract con ON ai.contract_id = con.id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_dcsx dcsx ON con.approve_id = dcsx.approve_id WHERE (ai.contract_no LIKE 'SPTS%' OR ai.contract_no LIKE 'KCS%' OR ai.contract_no LIKE 'XYS%') and con.business_type = 'ZY-BB' and pa.status in ('A','D') and ai.contract_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{contractNo},'%') and ai.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{companyName},'%')
and ai.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{companyName},'%')
and ai.our_company_name LIKE CONCAT(#{ourCompanyName},'%')
and ai.our_company_name IN
#{ourCompanyNameList[${index}],jdbcType=VARCHAR}
and pa.status = #{approveStatus}
AND DATE_FORMAT(con.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{contractTimeBegin}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(con.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') < DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#{contractTimeEnd}, '%Y-%m-%d'),INTERVAL 1 DAY)
and dcsx.invoice_bill_amount >= dcsx.total_amount
and dcsx.invoice_bill_amount < dcsx.total_amount
and ai.id in
#{invoiceBillIdList[${index}],jdbcType=BIGINT}
and pa.curr_approver_user_id LIKE CONCAT('%',#{currApproveUserId},'%')
UNION
SELECT ai.id id, ai.company_name companyName, ai.our_company_name ourCompanyName, ai.contract_no contractNo, con.contract_time contractTime, con.contract_type contractType, con.business_type businessType, con.buy_content_file_id buyContentFileId, con.sell_content_file_id sellContentFileId, con.file_id fileId, p.product_name productName, p.product_cd productCd, p.brand_number brandNumber, p.deal_number dealNumber, dcsx.deal_price dealPrice, ai.total_amount totalAmount, pa.created_date applyDate, ai.invoice_date invoiceDate, ai.deal_amount invoiceAmount, ai.remark remark, ai.invoice_no invoiceNo, pa.approve_no approveNo, pa.`status` approveStatus, pa.curr_approver_user_id currApproveUserId, dcsx.contract_no dcsxContractNo, if(dcsx.invoice_bill_amount >= dcsx.total_amount,'已开票','未开票') dcsxInvoiceStatus, ai.bank_name bankName, ai.bank_account bankAccount, ai.tax_no taxNo, ai.address address, ai.company_phone companyPhone, dcsx.file_id dcsxContractFileId FROM t_apply_invoice ai INNER JOIN t_pm_approve pa ON ai.approve_id = pa.id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_dcsx dcsx ON ai.contract_id = dcsx.id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract con ON con.approve_id = dcsx.approve_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_product p ON p.ctr_contract_id = con.id WHERE (ai.contract_no LIKE 'SPTX%' OR ai.contract_no LIKE 'KCX%' OR ai.contract_no LIKE 'XYX%') and con.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND con.contract_type = 'S' and pa.status in ('A','D')
and ai.contract_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{contractNo},'%')
and ai.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{companyName},'%')
and ai.our_company_name LIKE CONCAT(#{ourCompanyName},'%')
and ai.our_company_name IN
#{ourCompanyNameList[${index}],jdbcType=VARCHAR}
and pa.status = #{approveStatus}
AND DATE_FORMAT(con.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{contractTimeBegin}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(con.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') < DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#{contractTimeEnd}, '%Y-%m-%d'),INTERVAL 1 DAY)
and dcsx.invoice_bill_amount >= dcsx.total_amount
and dcsx.invoice_bill_amount < dcsx.total_amount
and ai.id in
#{invoiceBillIdList[${index}],jdbcType=BIGINT}
and pa.curr_approver_user_id LIKE CONCAT('%',#{currApproveUserId},'%')
) tem
order by tem.id desc
SELECT user_id, user_name, company_names, remark, enterprise_id FROM t_bs_funder WHERE user_id = #{userId}
